title: Discussion & Warm-Up Generator
description: Generate discussion questions or a quick warm-up activity for a topic.
template: Help me generate discussion questions or a 5-minute warm-up activity for {subject}, {gradeLevel}, on {topic}. Then write exactly 5 open-ended discussion questions, numbered 1-5, ordered from easiest to most challenging. After question 5, add one quick warm-up activity idea under the heading 'Warm-Up'.
